productOptionsHtml:

Catalog highlights

  • Everyday Pocketed Waist Apron
  • Size: 23"W x 11"L, 40" waist ties & 3 - 7.5" x 7.5" pocket sections
  • Fabric: 7.5 oz. 65/35 poly cotton twill treated for stain resistance
  • Colors: Brown, Hot Pink, Light Brown, Lime Green, Mango Yellow, Orange, Sage Green, Silver, Teal Green, Turquoise, Yellow, Olive Green, Jade
  • Sold blank, decoration is available upon request and is based on quantity

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Everyday Pocketed Waist Apron. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style EF9 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 2 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 25 units (per catalog line).
